name: Hearty Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the potatoes, carrots, and celery in water until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain the vegetables, reserving the liquid.
3. In the same pot, sauté the onion in butter until soft.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Gently stir in the cooked vegetables.
6. Add 1 cup or more of reserved cooking liquid until the soup reaches the desired consistency.
Yield: 8-10 servings, about 2-1/2 quarts.
